_fixture_meta.description: Growth persona reduces NKLA citing balance-sheet deterioration (cash runway <6 months) and dilution risk that structurally breaks the growth-at-scale thesis.
_fixture_meta.provenance: hand-authored 2026-06-22; NKLA balance sheet issues are public record; no live-run data used

thesis_status.reason: The growth thesis assumed NKLA would reach unit economics breakeven before requiring further dilutive capital raises. Cash runway is now below 6 months and the company filed a preliminary prospectus for an additional equity offering at a 40% discount to NAV. This is not a price-volatility issue — it is a structural change in the capital requirements that invalidates the path-to-scale thesis we underwrote.
